case.title: FLEISCHER v. W. P. I. X., INC.

opinion.h4: FLEISCHER v. W. P. I. X., INC., (1962)

FLEISCHER v. W. P. I. X., INC., ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK AND THE APPELLATE DIVISION OF THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW YORK, FIRST JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT. No. 78, Misc. Decided October 8, 1962.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Daniel Huttenbrauck and Seymour Shainswit for appellees.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE GOLDBERG took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
